title: 10 health benefits of Leonurus sibiricus (motherwort)
intro: Leonurus sibiricus has health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, relieving anxiety and stress, and promoting menstruation. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoid glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. By consuming motherwort tea or supplements, individuals can alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS) and menopause, improving overall well-being and quality of life. Additionally, its sedative properties can help with insomnia and restlessness, promoting a good night's sleep.
